blockingIssues.description: Feature required installing @tamagui/cli, but web/package.json does not include it.
Navbar collapse/hamburger behavior is implemented at md (<=640px) instead of required xl breakpoint.

appliedUpdates.description: Added .factory/library/tamagui-typescript-gotchas.md capturing validated Tamagui TypeScript constraints (sticky wrapper and useMedia preference).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Make the mandatory TDD step conditional for config/layout-only features and allow a visual/computed-style-first verification path when no practical component test harness exists.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: All three reviews flagged repeated TDD deviations for this milestone; two reviewer observations explicitly cite mismatch between mandatory TDD instruction and actual frontend workflow.

rejectedObservations.observation: Document that @typescript-eslint/no-empty-interface is unavailable in this lint setup.
rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous (single-session evidence from generated lint attempt; not independently reproduced during this scrutiny run)

rejectedObservations.observation: Add separate guidance update for missing web component test harness.
rejectedObservations.reason: duplicate (covered by the broader TDD-conditional skill guidance recommendation)
